sizing_rule.note: Reduce position size (0.65× impact reduction factor) when instrument's portfolio impact exceeds 25% based on volatility × contract notional ÷ total equity. Rebalance every 10 days. Inverse sizing: smaller positions in high-impact assets, larger in low-impact assets.

source_rule_text: A trader should allocate position size inversely to the portfolio impact of that instrument, sizing smaller in high-impact assets and larger in low-impact assets, based on the percentage of portfolio return driven by each position.
